description: Real-life test case for turning non-ready Bangkok source photos into a Grey-style editorial Contact Sheet.

sourceIntent.targetOutcome: Generate a Contact Sheet that preserves Huy's identity while transferring the style-source vibe and inventing stronger editorial composition, story, color, and detail.

identityLock.description: How strongly the output must preserve the Creator's face, body structure, age, skin tone, and recognizable identity.

styleTransferStrength.description: How strongly the output borrows color, lens, lighting, finish, atmosphere, and taste from the style-source photos.

compositionInvention.description: How much the model may invent pose, framing, camera angle, set blocking, and visual hierarchy instead of preserving the uploaded photo composition.

storyInvention.description: How much the model may invent an editorial moment or implied story instead of copying a plain source-photo situation.

sourcePhotoDependence.description: How much the final result should resemble the uploaded photos beyond identity.

variantMatrix.description: Default reusable product behavior: preserve identity, transfer style strongly, invent better composition and a moderate story.
Conservative identity preservation with strong but less risky composition invention.
More aggressive transfer from the style reference while preserving recognizable identity.

versioningPolicy.outputs: saved under the variant and run that produced them
